footer.bio: Senior AI/ML Engineer building intelligent systems with Generative AI, LLMs, and modern machine learning.

hero.name: Asad Rana
hero.title: Sr AI/ML Engineer
hero.tagline: Building intelligent systems that push the boundaries of what's possible with Generative AI and LLMs.

about.heading: Turning complex AI research into production-ready systems
about.bio1: I'm a Senior AI/ML Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing and deploying intelligent systems at scale. My work spans Generative AI, large language models, and end-to-end ML pipelines that solve real business problems.
about.bio2: From architecting multi-agent LangGraph workflows to fine-tuning transformer models, I bring both research depth and engineering rigor to every project. I've contributed to products used by thousands of users across fintech, identity verification, and enterprise SaaS.
about.bio3: Currently focused on pushing the frontier of agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines, and production LLM deployments on Azure and AWS.

skills.heading: The stack I build with
skills.subheading: A curated set of tools and frameworks I use to architect, train, and deploy AI systems at scale.

projects.heading: Things I've shipped
projects.subheading: A selection of production systems and research projects spanning AI agents, identity verification, and enterprise platforms.

contact.heading: Let's build something together
contact.subheading: I'm currently open to senior AI/ML engineering roles and consulting engagements. Reach out and let's talk.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
